name: claude-result-speak-cat
description: A desktop pet that pops up in the bottom-right corner to deliver Claude Code notifications.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for notification messages (ja / en / cat)

display_seconds.title: Display duration (seconds)
display_seconds.description: How long the pet stays on screen

pet_size.title: Pet size (px)
pet_size.description: Width and height of the cat in pixels

message_complete.title: Message (complete)
message_complete.description: Completion message. Leave blank to use the language default.

message_permission.title: Message (permission)
message_permission.description: Permission prompt message. Leave blank to use the language default.

message_idle.title: Message (idle)
message_idle.description: Idle message. Leave blank to use the language default.
